race.comment: Progressive three-year-old FABULANTES (2) has been most impressive in winning his last three against his own age group, the latest a last-to-first victory over today's rival CALL DA VINCI over 1200m. Won a trial at Doomben since that success. Certainly up to this tougher assignment. SPANISH TREASURE (6) made late ground but just failed to pick up THE WHEELBARROW when resuming over 1200m at this circuit a fortnight ago. Finished third in the 1400m Listed Magic Millions Guineas in January. Has the class to play a key role. CALL DA VINCI (4) met with strong support but found FABULANTES too good when they clashed at the Gold Coast five weeks ago. At his best over 1400m so this looks a nice race. BRAVE MONARCH (8) caught the eye first-up and over an extra 200m poses a serious threat.
